author: codex
scope: Relation cleanup prep artifact only. Deterministic/Codex-only inspection; no provider-backed commands, materialize, validate, export-jsonl, canonicalize, campaign dedup, identity-review-run, ontology-normalize-run, write, ask, schema, profile/provider commands, generated canonical JSONL/DB/wiki edits, submission journal edits, or retired override edits.

result.reason: Current relation endpoint-shape inventory is zero. There are no high-confidence unexpected endpoint-shape or inverse-direction/data-error retire+replacement candidates that are not already retired/replaced.

canonical_relation_inventory.method: Read current canonical JSONL record kinds and relation payload endpoints, then apply the current RELATION_ENDPOINT_SHAPES table from packages/pipeline/src/records/relations.ts. Fully retired submissions were also checked against data/submission-overrides/retired.json.

validation_evidence.latest_cleanup_log: data/review_notes/codex-canonical-cleanup-2026-06-21.jsonl reports after identity batch115-117 orientation correction: validate reports duplicate_global_identity issues and no unexpected_relation_endpoint_shape issues.

commands_run_read_only: find data -maxdepth 3 for relation cleanup, canonical relation, and retired override files
rg over relation cleanup notes, rule-or-data notes, cleanup journal, retired overrides, submissions, and canonical relations
node deterministic endpoint-shape inventory over data/canonical/*.jsonl and data/submission-overrides/retired.json
git status --short scoped to review notes, submission overrides, submissions, canonical data, and relation validator file
